response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid IC software development experience and some adjacent developer-tooling work (D test runner Trial, fluent-asserts, MCP code generators) plus teaching/workshop experience, but the resume shows no people-management or team-leadership tenure, no clear engineering-management track record, and only minimal/dated mobile-platform exposure (Apple TV/iOS at WatchUp ~2015–2016). For a Level II Engineering Manager role centered on people leadership, dev-productivity org strategy, and mobile-platform tooling, the critical management requirement is unmet.
strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack and systems engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded
Hands-on dev-tooling contributions: test runner (Trial), assertion library, MCP/agent tooling, CI/CD setup
Demonstrated teaching/mentoring via workshops, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, FOSS4G talk
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience listed (fails 2-year minimum)
Mobile-platform experience is limited and ~10 years old; not aligned with current major mobile ecosystem focus
No evidence of organizational-change leadership, roadmap ownership, or managing engineering productivity at scale
